CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-29-2008 CONTINUED TO APR-11-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WORLD SAVINGS BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR 5963
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CAL STATE 9 CREDIT UNION HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CAL STATE 9 CREDIT UNION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED AS TO FIRST, SECOND AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE STATEMENTS MADE BY WORLD OR CREDIT UNION TO PLAINTIFF AND FURTHER ALLEGES THAT DUDUM AND ATLANTIC WERE ACTING FOR PLAINTIFF. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THEIR STATEMENTS ARE NOT BINDING ON WORLD OR CREDIT UNION. SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. LENDERS DO NOT OWE A BORROWER A DUTY OF CARE ABSENT PLEADING SPECIAL CIRCUMSTANCES AND NONE ARE ALLEGED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON ALLEGATIONS OF MUTUAL MISTAKE. MR. YANDELL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
NOTICE OF FILING OF DISMISSAL BY BANKRUPTCY COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAL STATE 9 CREDIT UNION
